raw_consumer_statement:
Claim ID # XXXX Dear Citi Disputes Department, I am writing to formally escalate my ongoing dispute and request that a Dispute Manager personally review the evidence I have already submitted. 

The merchant sent items that arrived damaged and unwearable. After I reported the issue, the merchant promised replacement parts, but those parts were never shipped. Instead, the merchant provided a fake tracking number, XXXX, which shows no legitimate shipment activity using XXXX, which is used for international shipment tracking. This will prove clear evidence of deception and fraud. 

Despite submitting documentation that clearly supports my claim, the last XXXX dispute associates assigned to my case have failed to properly review or acknowledge this evidence. If the evidence were reviewed thoroughly, it would be evident that the merchant misrepresented their actions and did not fulfill their obligations, hence, asking the merchant to provide tracking details of the replacement parts. This would show deception from the merchant. 

I am extremely disappointed with how this dispute has been handled. I have been a Citi cardholder since XXXX, and this experience does not reflect the level of service or fairness I expect as a long-term customer. I am upset that I have had to repeatedly explain the same facts while my supporting documentation continues to be overlooked. 
I am respectfully requesting that a Dispute Manager conduct a full and proper review of my case and the evidence provided, and that appropriate corrective action be taken. 

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. I look forward to a fair resolution. Also since this dispute, the merchants account on XXXX reads, '' Sorry, this account has been closed. Please take note of the relevant risks. '' Which further proves the deception of this merchant.
